interface.longDescription:
NA Drink Finder is the world's largest database of venues serving NA drinks.  The app maps over one million bars, restaurants, breweries, and stores worldwide that offer non-alcoholic beer, mocktails, wine, and spirits, making it easy to find options wherever you are.

NA Drink Finder is built for anyone exploring mindful drinking, including Dry January, sobriety, health reasons, or personal preference.
defaultPrompt: Where can I buy non-alcoholic beer in Manhattan
